query:
-- Bull Put Spread Presets (Conservative/Medium/Aggressive)
INSERT INTO filterPresets (userId, strategy, presetName, minDte, maxDte, minDelta, maxDelta, minOpenInterest, minVolume, minRsi, maxRsi, minIvRank, maxIvRank, minBbPercent, maxBbPercent, minScore, maxStrikePercent)
VALUES 
(1, 'bps', 'conservative', 14, 45, '0.10', '0.25', 50, 50, 10, 35, 40, 100, '0', '0.3', 60, 100),
(1, 'bps', 'medium', 10, 30, '0.15', '0.30', 75, 40, 25, 45, 30, 100, '0', '0.5', 50, 105),
(1, 'bps', 'aggressive', 7, 21, '0.20', '0.35', 50, 30, 30, 50, 20, 100, '0', '0.7', 40, 110);

-- Bear Call Spread Presets (Conservative/Medium/Aggressive)
INSERT INTO filterPresets (userId, strategy, presetName, minDte, maxDte, minDelta, maxDelta, minOpenInterest, minVolume, minRsi, maxRsi, minIvRank, maxIvRank, minBbPercent, maxBbPercent, minScore, maxStrikePercent)
VALUES 
(1, 'bcs', 'conservative', 14, 45, '0.10', '0.25', 50, 50, 65, 90, 40, 100, '0.7', '1.0', 60, 105),
(1, 'bcs', 'medium', 10, 30, '0.15', '0.30', 75, 40, 55, 75, 30, 100, '0.5', '1.0', 50, 110),
(1, 'bcs', 'aggressive', 7, 21, '0.20', '0.35', 50, 30, 50, 70, 20, 100, '0.3', '1.0', 40, 115);
